# UNNotificationContentExtensionResponseOption.dismissAndForwardAction

**Case**

Dismiss the notification interface and forward the notification to the app.

## Declaration

```swift
case dismissAndForwardAction
```

## Discussion

Choose this option when you want the app to respond to the action or handle it.

## Response Options

- **UNNotificationContentExtensionResponseOption.doNotDismiss**: Don’t dismiss the notification interface.
- **UNNotificationContentExtensionResponseOption.dismiss**: Dismiss the notification interface.
title: UNNotificationContentExtensionResponseOption.dismissAndForwardAction
